module.name: boxplot
module.description: Horizontal box-and-whisker plots on a shared scale — one series per section, "label | min q1 median q3 max". For comparing distributions (five-number summaries).
module.aiSpec:
BOX-AND-WHISKER plots for comparing distributions by their five-number summaries. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one series per section written `label | min q1 median q3 max` (five space-separated numbers). All series share one horizontal scale. Use this when you already have the quartiles; for a raw frequency distribution use @histogram, and for arbitrary plots use @chartjs.
Body: one `label | min q1 median q3 max` per section. Numbers are sorted defensively, so order within a section is forgiving.
Parameters: - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): box/whisker/median color. - min (number, default blank = auto): fixes the scale's low end; blank auto-fits the data. - max (number, default blank = auto): fixes the scale's high end; blank auto-fits the data. - showscale (boolean, default true): show the min/max scale readout under the rows. - rowheight (number px, default 26): height of each plotting row (12–80). - sort (select: none | asc | desc, default none): none keeps written order; asc/desc sort series by median. - fillopacity (number %, default 22): opacity of the box fill tint (0–100).
Usage: <!-- @boxplot sort: desc, showscale: true --> Group A | 2 5 8 11 15 <!-- @ --> Group B | 4 6 7 9 12 <!-- @end -->

param.name: min
param.label: Scale min
param.desc: Low end of the shared scale; blank = auto.

param.name: max
param.label: Scale max
param.desc: High end of the shared scale; blank = auto.

param.name: showscale
param.label: Show scale
param.desc: Show the min/max readout under the rows.

param.name: sort
param.label: Sort
param.options: none:As written,asc:By median (low to high),desc:By median (high to low)

param.name: fillopacity
param.label: Box fill %
param.desc: Opacity of the box fill tint.

snippet.label: Box plot (five-number)
snippet.description: Box-and-whisker rows; each "label | min q1 median q3 max".
